title: Scam Reports
description: A mod for DonutSMP that marks if they are a scammer or not in game.
body:
# A Scammers Worst Nightmare

In the vast world of DonutSMP, player interactions are key to the game's enjoyment. Unfortunately, some individuals exploit this by engaging in scams, tarnishing the trust within the community to keep up on their end of the deal.

That's where **Scam Reports** comes in. Created by the amazing developer Dery, this mod is your ultimate tool to combat scammers by providing a clear indicator for any reported player within minecraft itself! If a player has been reported in our database, the word "**SCAMMER**" will appear next to their nametag in-game.

With **Scam Reports**, you can trade with confidence, knowing who to avoid without having to continuously tab out!

## IMPORTANT NOTE!!
**Scam Reports** and it's creators are in no way affiliated with DonutSMP and its creators. We are a separate community driven to create a better experience for the players of DonutSMP. Along with that scamming is **allowed** on DonutSMP and in no way banned on the server.


### How It Works
This mod is directly integrated with our database containing all reported scammers. Placing a red tag beside any reported players nametag. 

## Join the Fight Against Scammers
Connect with us on the official **DonutSMP Scam Reports** Discord server! Recieve updates on new scammers and collaborate with other players to create a safer, scam-free environment.
## Found a Scammer? No Problem!
If you have found someone who scammed you that isnt reported, feel free to join our Discord and report them!

## Issues?
If you recieve any issues or bugs with the mod, please inform us on **Discord** by opening a General Support ticket.

## Start Protecting Yourself Today
**Scam Reports** isn't just a mod, it's a community committed to integrity and fairness. Equip yourself with this essential tool and help make DonutSMP a better place for everyone!
